news.summary: In Frøya, Norway on June 5, 2025, Kaldvík AS ("Kaldvík" or the "Company") announced the successful conclusion of a private placement. This involved the issuance of new shares generating around NOK 532 million, roughly EUR 46.2 million.
news.headline: Kaldvík AS completed private placement, raising NOK 532 million (EUR 46.2 million) in gross proceeds.

news.summary: A program has been launched in Palo Alto, California on June 5, 2025, by ThroughPut.AI, focusing on assisting businesses in leveraging their current technology stack for quick results. The initiative aims at providing actionable insights for measurable outcomes without the need for new integrations or delays. Through this program, businesses can unlock rapid results from their existing tech stack, with the goal of driving efficiency and productivity.
news.headline: ThroughPut.AI introduces Catalyst Program to drive AI-driven supply chain improvements without new tools. Aiding companies to optimize tech stack, achieving measurable results. PALO ALTO, Calif., June 5, 2025 /PRNewswire.

news.summary: A significant 65% of hiring managers are expressing worries over potential misuse of next-generation AI tools like ChatGPT by candidates to manipulate recruitment evaluations. Contrastingly, a mere 15% of inexperienced professionals and job seekers indicated willingness to utilize such tools, highlighting a notable "trust disconnect" between the two groups. Talent management specialists are noting...
news.headline: 65% of hiring managers worry about GenAI cheating in recruitment, but only 15% of job seekers would use it. Talent experts concerned.

news.summary: Introduced this week in Washington, the LEON Act, backed by OIC of America, aims to address the long-term labor shortage and provide avenues for individuals to escape poverty. Congressman Dwight Evans (D-PA-3rd) and Congressman Chuck Edwards (R-NC-11th) are the key proponents of this legislation. The act is vital for tackling pressing issues in society and is anticipated to have a significant impact on the workforce.
news.headline: Congressmen Evans and Edwards introduce LEON Act to build national skills-training system, tackle labor shortage.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in Zhongshan, China, the "High-Quality Development Project for Counties, Towns, and Villages" has been initiated, following the "1310" development strategy proposed by the CPC Guangdong Provincial Committee. This initiative aims to drive progress and growth in the region.
news.headline: Zhongshan City in China sees significant progress in "High-Quality Development Project" after 3 years with "1310" strategy.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in Shanghai, the China Shanghai International Boat Show 2026 is set to feature advancements in the shipping sector to align with the "dual carbon" objectives. The event will highlight pure electric boats, hybrid electric boats, fuel cell electric boats, marine power batteries, and more in response to industry transformation. Visitors can expect to witness the latest innovations in sustainable marine transportation technologies to reduce carbon emissions and promote eco-friendly practices.
news.headline: CIBS2026 Sales launched in Shanghai to boost industry consumption with electric boats. Shows include fuel cell and marine batteries.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, HYPOTHESIS, a pioneering medical wear brand recognized for its innovative designs, revealed an unprecedented collaboration with (RED), an organization established by Bono and Bobby Shriver in 2006 to combat AIDS. This partnership marks a significant milestone in the field of healthcare fashion and aims to raise awareness and support for AIDS initiatives.
news.headline: Hypothesis Medical Wear partners with (RED) to fight AIDS in a groundbreaking initiative - June 5, 2025.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in Waukesha, Wisconsin, Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE: GNRC), renowned for its energy technology solutions and power products, disclosed the elevation of Jim Barnes to the role of Executive Vice President – Global Supply Chain. This move underlines the company's strategic efforts to enhance its supply chain operations and strengthen its global presence.
news.headline: Generac promotes Jim Barnes to EVP of Global Supply Chain; effective June 5, 2025. Headquarters in Waukesha, Wisconsin.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in Indianapolis, Gray Capital, a multifamily investment company, disclosed the introduction of its Midwest Multifamily Fund. This fund is tailored for institutional investors, family offices, and individuals with substantial net worth.
news.headline: Gray Capital starts $200MM Midwest Multifamily Fund to acquire $500MM in Apartment Assets.

news.summary: Yesterday, Thomson Reuters (TSX/Nasdaq: TRI) disclosed the outcome of the election of the company's Board of Directors at its annual shareholders' meeting in Toronto on June 4, 2025. All 14 nominees put forth were successfully voted onto the Thomson Reuters Board.
news.headline: Thomson Reuters reports all 14 nominees elected to Board of Directors at annual meeting.

news.summary: Today, Ballard Power Systems disclosed a new deal with Sierra Northern Railway, a rail operator in California, for the provision of 1.5 MW of fuel cell engines. The agreement marks a significant partnership between the two entities and highlights Ballard Power Systems' growing presence in the alternative energy sector. The supply agreement solidifies the commitment to exploring eco-friendly solutions in the transportation industry and signifies a notable milestone for both companies involved.
news.headline: Ballard secures 1.5 MW fuel cell engine order from Sierra Northern Railway in California.

news.summary: ELGN-2112, a novel treatment for intestinal malabsorption in preterm infants, could become the first of its kind. Elgan Pharma and Chiesi Farmaceutici S.p.A have joined forces in the development of ELGN-2112. This collaboration, announced on June 5, 2025, is set to bring innovative therapeutic options to the market. The companies, based in NAZARETH, Israel, and PARMA, Italy, respectively, aim to address the specific needs of this vulnerable population. This groundbreaking initiative marks a significant step forward in pediatric healthcare, potentially impacting a substantial number of preterm neonates worldwide.
news.headline: Elgan Pharma & Chiesi Group start Phase 3 study of ELGN-2112 for preterm infants with intestinal malabsorption.

news.summary: In Vancouver, BC, on June 5, 2025, Ballard Power Systems shared outcomes from its 2025 Annual General Meeting on June 4th. All individuals nominated in the Management Proxy Circular from April 7, 2025, are now directors. Ballard Power Systems trades under NASDAQ: BLDP and TSX: BLDP.
news.headline: Ballard Power Systems reveals 2025 Annual General Meeting results with all management proxy candidates elected as directors.

news.summary: Today, The Michaels Companies, Inc. finalized the acquisition, welcoming JOANN customers with a focus on expanding fabric, sewing, and yarn offerings. The move ensures continued access to beloved brands and includes special offers. This step signifies a significant growth opportunity for the company.
news.headline: Michaels Companies, Inc. acquires JOANN® IP and brands, bringing expanded offerings and special offers.

news.summary: Today, in Atlanta on June 5, 2025, Graphic Packaging Holding Company (NYSE: GPK) revealed that Stephen R. Scherger, Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, will be speaking at the Wells Fargo event. Graphic Packaging is known for its sustainable consumer packaging and is a prominent player in the industry. This news showcases the company's commitment to transparency and innovation.
news.headline: Graphic Packaging (NYSE: GPK) to present at Wells Fargo Industrials and Materials Conference on June 11. Vice President to speak.

news.summary: The latest survey showed a significant drop in the number of respondents with a positive outlook on the economy, decreasing from 47% in the previous quarter to 27%. Over 50% of those surveyed anticipate the U.S. to enter a recession by the end of the year. Additionally, the hiring outlook has become more competitive. Business executives' sentiment towards the economy has worsened, with recession concerns looming. This data was released on June 5, 2025, with notable changes in economic perceptions and expectations among industry professionals.
news.headline: Survey finds business executives' optimism about U.S. economy plunges to 27% from 47% last quarter, with over half anticipating recession by year-end. Hiring outlook tightens.

news.summary: A collaboration has been announced between PXP and Castles Technology in London, aimed at providing Android-based terminal technology to merchants of varying sizes. This strategic partnership is set to revolutionize the merchant services sector, offering advanced technology solutions to a wide range of businesses. The partnership highlights the increasing importance of adapting to modern technology in the payment industry.
news.headline: PXP and Castles Technology team up to bring Android terminals to global merchants, enhancing retail experience.

news.summary: According to a report recently released, the construction industry in Peru is projected to see growth in 2025. After experiencing a 4.6% increase in real terms in 2024, the sector is expected to expand by 3.8% this year. This growth is supported by private-sector investments in mining and increased public spending on transportation and infrastructure projects. The report provides insights into various sectors such as commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets, analyzing trends and forecasts up to 2029. The data comes from ResearchAndMarkets.com, a comprehensive source for market analysis.
news.headline: Peru's construction industry is forecasted to grow by 3.8% in 2025, following a 4.6% growth in 2024. Key sectors include commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy, utilities, institutional, and residential markets.

news.summary: In Boston, HqO, a prominent real estate experience platform, has named Kunal Lala as the Senior Managing Director to drive growth and customer relationships in EMEA. This signifies a crucial move in bolstering HqO's dedication to providing a worldwide platform that caters to the requirements of tenants and investors. The appointment aims to enhance operational efficiency as markets undergo transformations.
news.headline: HqO appoints Kunal Lala as EMEA Leader to accelerate European growth strategy. Positively impacting customer partnerships.

news.summary: Tradeweb Markets Inc. (Nasdaq: TW), a prominent global operator of electronic marketplaces for rates, credit, equities, and money markets, disclosed that their total trading volume for May 2025 amounted to $55.4 trillion. The average daily volume (ADV) for the same month stood at $2.5 trillion, marking a notable 33.3% increase year-over-year (YoY). Excluding the impact of the ICD acquisition, which was finalized on August 1, 2024, the total ADV for May demonstrated a 20.3% YoY growth.
news.headline: Tradeweb's May 2025 total trading volume hit $55.4 trillion, with an average daily volume of $2.5 trillion.

news.summary: In West Warwick, Rhode Island, AstroNova, Inc. disclosed that their revenue for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026 increased by 14%. This growth was primarily fueled by double-digit expansion in both Aerospace and Product Identification segments. The company, listed on Nasdaq as ALOT, experienced a significant boost in their financial performance with this rise in revenue.
news.headline: AstroNova Inc. (Nasdaq: ALOT) Q1 FY2026 revenue up 14%, supported by double-digit growth in Aerospace & Product Identification segments.

news.summary: Albany, N.Y.-- Soluna Holdings, Inc. "Soluna," a company listed on NASDAQ as SLNH, specializes in establishing eco-friendly data centers designed for demanding computing tasks such as Bitcoin mining and AI applications. In their recent announcement regarding the project site operations for May 2025, Soluna shared various developments and updates. The company disclosed essential details including company performance metrics accessible monthly. Furthermore, Soluna reported their Q1-25 results, highlighting a revenue of $5.9 million during the first quarter.
news.headline: Soluna Holdings reports May 2025 project updates; Q1-25 $5.9M revenue. ($SLNH #SLNH)
